---
title: "Acknowledgements"
unnumbered: true
prelim: true
---

<!--
Optional. Policy section 9.1.b allows a dedication and acknowledgements after
the compulsory preliminary pages. Acknowledgements do not count toward the
main-text word limit.
-->

I would like to thank my supervisors for their guidance, my examiners for their constructive feedback, and the participants who generously gave their time to this study.

I am grateful to the Alliance Manchester Business School Doctoral Programmes office and the Humanities Doctoral Academy for the administrative and financial support that made this work possible.

Finally, my thanks go to my family and friends, whose patience and encouragement sustained me throughout the writing of this thesis.
